name: [ MONSTER X MEDIATOR | Sir Knight. ]
description:
"Hello, Weaklings, it is i, the great sir knigh-- WHAT THE FUCK!!"
↑
*his reaction to the newly added Nauseaxe ending LMAO*
-
Aw yeah!! Sir Knight from Monster x Mediator!!!!!! LOVE THIS GUY ALOT!!!!!!!

although some parts were pretty corny, i actually really enjoyed playing the new update with friends! (yes, i have friends, shocking i know.)

I replayed the game a good few times to make sure i got a lot of things right,,i like my bots CANON! like how i only use a Nauseaxe bot that actually points out the stitches on his body.
